KXCPI-26MAY-T0.4.reason: Tariff pass-through and sticky services CPI suggest elevated monthly readings, but market slightly overprices tail given energy offset.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.5.reason: A 0.5%+ monthly print requires broad-based acceleration beyond tariff goods; services and shelter moderation keeps this below market.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.6.reason: Very elevated 0.6%+ monthly CPI is possible but unlikely; small upward edge vs market given residual tariff uncertainty.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.7.reason: Near-0.7% monthly CPI would require energy spike plus broad goods surge simultaneously; slightly above market given fat tail risk.

KXCPI-26MAY-T0.8.reason: Extreme 0.8%+ monthly print is very unlikely absent a supply shock; estimate in line with market.
